title: Prestige 4 Wheel Large 42L PUSH or PULL LIGHTWEIGHT Shopping Trolley Cart with Brakes, Adjustable Handles, 8L Separate Cool Bag, (FULLY ASSEMBLED READY TO USE) (Light Check)
features: FREE - Matching Insulated Cool bag worth £14.99 included (fully detachable with shoulder strap).
42 Litres capacity (room enough for a weeks shop)
Swivel Front wheels for easier maneuvering
description: The perfect trolley for those looking to travel with an extremely lightweight shopper which has a large capacity for storage. This model is available in 2 popular colours. This versatile trolley gives you the option to either push in front of you or pull behind you. 1 year frame guarantee to give you confidence when buying this highly rated new product! The swivel front wheel comes away from the classic cheap 2 wheel trolley which fails to turn corners and maneuver smoothly. Make life easier by investing into your convenience! No Need to worry about following tedious instructions and assembling the trolley as we do it all for you. The trolley will arrive fully assembled which no other company will offer. Instructions will still be included. There are 2 foot brakes located on each of the rear wheels. This allows you to feel confident your trolley will not roll down any hills or get away from you in any circumstance. Weighs only 3kg which is suitable for taking the trolley in and out of the car or on and off public transport. The trolley folds completely flat with or without the bags attached so you have the option to keep the trolley stored away neatly with ease.
